features.name: InboxPoller — poll all 4 platform inboxes for unread messages
features.description: Async Python poller calling GET /api/messages on IG (3001), Twitter (3003), TikTok (3102), LinkedIn (3105). Returns normalized InboxMessage list per platform. Handle 401/timeout gracefully with per-platform error logging

features.name: ReplyClassifier — classify messages as reply, new_lead, bounce, or ignore
features.description: For each message: if contact exists in crm_contacts AND is_outbound=True in last touch → classify as 'reply'. If no existing contact → 'new_lead'. If bounce keywords present → 'bounce'. Else 'ignore'. Returns ClassifiedMessage dataclass

features.name: Supabase upsert — store all inbound messages in crm_messages
features.description: INSERT to crm_messages for every new inbound message: contact_id (or null for new_lead), platform, message_text, is_outbound=False, received_at. Skip if already stored (unique on platform+message_id). Dedup via external_message_id field

features.name: PipelineAdvancer — advance contacts on reply
features.description: For classified 'reply' messages: UPDATE crm_contacts SET pipeline_stage='replied', last_reply_at=NOW(). INSERT to acq_funnel_events with from_stage=prev_stage, to_stage='replied', trigger='inbound_message'. Return AdvancedContact list

features.name: NewLeadSeeder — create crm_contacts for new_lead messages
features.description: For 'new_lead' classified messages: upsert to crm_contacts with pipeline_stage='replied', source='inbound_dm', platform handle set. Insert crm_messages with contact_id. Avoid duplicate contacts by checking platform handle first

features.name: HarvestRun logger — INSERT to acq_harvest_runs after each cycle
features.description: After each full platform poll cycle: INSERT to acq_harvest_runs with platform, messages_found, replies_classified, new_leads_seeded, bounces, errors[], duration_ms, harvested_at. Enables monitoring and debugging

features.name: InboxReplyHarvester.run() — main harvest loop
features.description: Main entry: for each platform in ['instagram','twitter','tiktok','linkedin']: poll inbox, classify each message, upsert to crm_messages, advance pipeline, seed new leads. Log run. Return HarvestResult with total counts across platforms

features.name: CLI — python3 acquisition/inbox_reply_harvester.py --run
features.description: CLI flags: --platform (single platform), --dry-run (classify but no writes), --limit N (max messages per platform). Print harvest summary table. Matches crm_brain.py CLI pattern

features.name: Cron registration — inbox_harvest every 15 minutes
features.description: Register cron_definitions.py entry: inbox_harvest (every 15 min). Trigger InboxReplyHarvester.run(). Gate behind ENABLE_INBOX_HARVEST config flag. Add ENABLE_INBOX_HARVEST=true to .env.example

features.name: Rate limiter — respect platform DM service rate limits
features.description: Add asyncio.sleep(1.0) between platform polls. Track per-platform last_polled_at in memory. Skip platform if polled within last 60 seconds (prevents hammering Safari services). Log skipped platforms

features.name: POST /api/acquisition/harvest/run endpoint
features.description: HTTP endpoint to trigger a harvest run. Accepts platform filter and dry_run flag. Returns HarvestResult synchronously. Useful for testing and manual triggers

features.name: GET /api/acquisition/harvest/runs endpoint
features.description: List recent harvest runs with pagination. Filter by platform, date range. Returns run stats with reply/new_lead/bounce counts. Used by dashboard to monitor inbox health

features.name: Tests — unit tests for classifier, pipeline advancer, dedup
features.description: pytest: test_reply_classifier_inbound_match, test_reply_classifier_new_lead, test_pipeline_advancer_updates_stage, test_new_lead_seeder_no_duplicate, test_harvest_run_logging. Mock platform inbox API responses

features.name: acq_harvest_runs Supabase table migration
features.description: CREATE TABLE acq_harvest_runs: id uuid PK, platform text, messages_found int, replies_classified int, new_leads_seeded int, bounces int, errors text[], duration_ms int, harvested_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(). Apply via supabase migration
